description: Triggers when user needs to implement or choose a state management solution in React/Next.js
should_trigger: Setup a Zustand store for my React app
How do I use TanStack Query for API data fetching?
Implement optimistic updates with React Query
Manage global client state in my Next.js app
Use React Context for theme switching
Handle server state and caching in my React components
should_not_trigger: Use URL search params for filter state
